name: io.github.tersignhq/evidence
description: Tersign — the evidence layer for the agent economy. Issue counter-signed x402 receipts and agent action records, verify a counterparty's receipt with no trust, and produce dispute-ready evidence envelopes for arbitration venues (Internet Court, Kleros, UMA).

environmentVariables.name: TERSIGN_SELLER_KEY
environmentVariables.description: 0x-prefixed private key the seller signs receipts with

environmentVariables.name: TERSIGN_LEDGER_URL
environmentVariables.description: Hosted ledger base URL for counter-signing (optional; SDK works standalone)

environmentVariables.name: TERSIGN_LEDGER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Ledger seller API key (required only if counter-signing)

environmentVariables.name: TERSIGN_LEDGER_SELLER_ID
environmentVariables.description: Ledger seller id (required only if counter-signing)
